CustomField.description: Stores the API name of a custom unique identifier field on the Account object used for matching during data import. When populated, the data import process uses this field instead of the standard name-based matching to find existing Organization Accounts.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter the API name of a unique ID field on Account to use for matching Organization Accounts (e.g., External_ID__c). Leave blank to use standard name matching.
CustomField.label: Account Custom Unique ID
